overall.description: Gameplay footage from a driving game featuring a first-person dashboard perspective navigating through an industrial urban district at dawn. The vehicle stops at multiple traffic lights while driving past brick warehouses, smokestacks, and vintage cars, with lighting transitioning from early morning to bright daylight.
